LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS JOSEPH CONTE & WATER 2 TABLE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT CONTE'S DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT WATER 2 TABLE, INC.'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED, WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANTS DEMUR TO THE ENTIRE COMPLAINT, AND NOT A SPECIFIC CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE A CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST DEFENDANT CONTE. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ARE NOT CLEARLY BARRED ON THE FACE OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT BY THE STATUTE OF FRAUDS. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE A CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST DEFENDANT WATER 2 TABLE, INC. THE PLEADINGS ARE NOT UNCERTAIN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO CSR7489.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling REGARDING DEFENDANTS JOSEPH CONTE & WATER 2 TABLE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Defendant Conte's demurrer is overruled. Defendant Water 2 Table, Inc.'s demurrer is sustained, with 10 days leave to amend. Defendants demur to the entire Complaint, and not a specific cause of action. Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts to allege a cause of action against Defendant Conte. Plaintiff's claims are not clearly barred on the face of the First Amended Complaint by the statute of frauds. Plaintiff has not pled sufficient facts to allege a cause of action against Defendant Water 2 Table, Inc. The pleadings are not uncertain. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR7489.
